Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Enum Class ReportTypeCategory

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ReportTypeCategory>
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ReportTypeCategory
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ReportTypeCategory>, Constable
public enum ReportTypeCategory extends Enum<ReportTypeCategory>

Java class for ReportTypeCategory

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <simpleType name="ReportTypeCategory">
   <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string">
     <enumeration value="accounts"/>
     <enumeration value="opportunities"/>
     <enumeration value="forecasts"/>
     <enumeration value="cases"/>
     <enumeration value="leads"/>
     <enumeration value="campaigns"/>
     <enumeration value="activities"/>
     <enumeration value="busop"/>
     <enumeration value="products"/>
     <enumeration value="admin"/>
     <enumeration value="territory"/>
     <enumeration value="other"/>
     <enumeration value="content"/>
     <enumeration value="usage_entitlement"/>
     <enumeration value="wdc"/>
     <enumeration value="calibration"/>
     <enumeration value="territory2"/>
     <enumeration value="quotes"/>
     <enumeration value="individual"/>
     <enumeration value="employee"/>
   </restriction>
 </simpleType>
